scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/ipfs && npm run build --workspace=packages/stellar && npm run build --workspace=packages/reclaim && npm run build --workspace=packages/storage
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
